[vc_row full_height=”yes” columns_placement=”middle” enable_overlay=”yes” el_class=”innerTitleBanner familyBanner” css=”.vc_custom_1729201079996{background-image: url(https://localhost:3000/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/SV-44.webp?id=62629) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}” overlay_bg=”rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)”][vc_column][vc_column_text]

HAIR SALON FOR WOMEN
WHERE STYLE AND CONFIDENCE MEET

Every visit to Groove Unisex Salon is more than just a haircut or color—it’s a step toward feeling empowered and beautiful. Our dedicated stylists create styles that stand the test of time, ensuring you leave the salon feeling refreshed and confident.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”familyPortraitPhotography”][vc_column][vc_column_text]

Choose One of Our Specialized Services

[/vc_column_text][vc_row_inner gap=”10″][vc_column_inner width=”1/4″]

Hair Cuts & Styling

[/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/4″]

Hair Colouring

[/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/4″]

Blowouts

[/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/4″]

Hair Spa Treatments

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”ourPricing”][vc_column][vc_column_text el_class=”pricingTitle”]

OUR PRICING

[/vc_column_text]

  • Hair Style and Cut
  • Hair Colour
  • Hair Spa Treatments
  • Children's Hair
[vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” el_class=”famSessionRow”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”62648″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text]

*Prices are Subject to Change and HST

Haircut and Style

  • Wash, Cut and Style $68+
  • Wash and Cut $30+
  • Wash and Style $37+
  • Add Curling $30+
  • Special Occasion Style $80+

[/vc_column_text][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”bookingwidget” el_class=”mainBannerBtn bottomBannerBtn”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner]

[vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” el_class=”famSessionRow”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”62870″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text]

*Prices Subject to Change Based on Product Usage Every Ounce After 3oz is $12.00/oz. FREE Haircut with Chemical Service.

Hair Colour

  • Regrowth Colour, Cut and Style $98+
  • Full Colour, Cut and Style $145+
  • Regrowth Colour, Foils, Cut and Style $160+ (Includes partial foil. Add $50 for Full Head)
  • Full Colour, Foils, Cut and Style $215+ (Includes partial foil. Add $50 for Full Head)
  • Partial Foil, Cut and Style $130+
  • Full Head Foil, Cut and Style $170+
  • Ombre, Cut and Style $200+
  • Balayage, Cut and Style $200+
  • Lived In Colour, Cut and Style $200+
  • Toner Refresh and Style (NO CUT) $80+
  • Add Root Melt $35
  • Fashion Colour Foils, Per Foil $20+
  • Colour Corrections $200++ and up
  • Additional Toner $10++ and up
  • Add Lowlight $10++ and up
  • Add Olaplex $20.00 per bowl

[/vc_column_text][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”bookingwidget” el_class=”mainBannerBtn bottomBannerBtn”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner]

[vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” el_class=”famSessionRow”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”62652″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text]

*Prices are Subject to Change and HST

Hair Spa Treatments

  • Olaplex Treatment $75+
  • Moisture Treatment $70+
  • Shine Treatment $70+
  • Colour Care Treatment $70+
  • Hard Water Treatment $70+
  • Filler Treatment $130+

[/vc_column_text][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”bookingwidget” el_class=”mainBannerBtn bottomBannerBtn”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner]

[vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” el_class=”famSessionRow”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”63013″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_column_text]

*Ages 4-12 ONLY 

Children Hair

Wash & Cut

Add Blow Dry/Style

[/vc_column_text][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”bookingwidget” el_class=”mainBannerBtn bottomBannerBtn”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner]

[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”meetTeam mangoApp transformLook”][vc_column][vc_column_text]

Transform Your Look with AURA Hair Studio

At Groove Unisex Salon, your hair is more than just a part of your appearance—it’s a reflection of your individuality. We understand that each woman’s hair journey is unique, and that’s why we are committed to providing tailored services to meet your specific needs. Whether it’s the latest trends or timeless styles, our professional team stays up-to-date with cutting-edge techniques to ensure we deliver exceptional results every time.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”familyPortraitPhotography gtaAreas imgBoxes”][vc_column][vc_row_inner gap=”10″][vc_column_inner width=”1/3″]

WEDDING HAIR

Prepare for your big day with expert in-shop styling experience. We create timeless, elegant looks for the brides and the members of her wedding party.

[/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/3″]

CHILDREN'S HAIR

We offer gentle and professional haircuts for children aged 4-12, ensuring a comfortable experience. Add a blow dry and style for a polished, youthful look.

[/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/3″]

EYEBROW TINT

Enhance your natural brows with our professional eyebrow tinting service for only $17, giving them fuller definition and lasting colour to complete your look.

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”ourProcess”][vc_column][vc_column_text el_class=”ourProcessTitle”]

Our Services

Expert Care For Every Hair Need

Explore our full list of services to find exactly what you’re looking for, and let our expert stylists help you achieve the perfect look, from subtle refreshes to bold transformations.[/vc_column_text][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” el_class=”stepRow”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”62915″ alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ el_class=”stepContent”][vc_column_text]

Hair Cuts & Styling

Our stylists offer a range of haircuts and styling services to match your vision. We focus on precision cutting and personalized styling to enhance your natural beauty.

  • Hair Washing
  • Hair Cutting
  • Hair Styling
  • Hair Curling

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” el_class=”stepRow”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”62914″ alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ el_class=”stepContent”][vc_column_text]

Hair Colouring

Our expert colourists specialize in using high-quality products to ensure each service leaves your hair vibrant, shiny, and healthy.

  • Regrowth Colour
  • Full Colour
  • Regrowth Colour & Foils
  • Partial Foil
  • Full Head Foil
  • Ombre
  • Balayage
  • Lived In Colour
  • Toner Refresh
  • Fashion Colour Foils
  • Colour Corrections

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle” el_class=”stepRow”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”62916″ alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ el_class=”stepContent”][vc_column_text]

Hair Spa Treatments

Pamper your hair with our luxurious spa treatments that revitalize and restore your hair’s health and shine. Whether your hair is damaged, dry, or simply in need of extra care, we have the perfect solution for you.

  • Olaplex Treatment
  • Moisture Treatment
  • Shine Treatment
  • Colour Care Treatment
  • Hard Water Treatment
  • Filler Treatment

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner el_class=”familyBtnBox”][vc_column_inner][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”bookingwidget” el_class=”mainBannerBtn”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_height=”yes” columns_placement=”middle” enable_overlay=”yes” el_class=”innerTitleBanner innerFaqsBanner” css=”.vc_custom_1729551450817{background-image: url(https://localhost:3000/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/shutterstock_2197452203-1.webp?id=62912) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}” overlay_bg=”rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2)”][vc_column][vc_column_text]

FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”FaqsList innerFaqsList”][vc_column]

How often should I get a haircut?

[vc_column_text]We recommend getting a haircut every 6-8 weeks to maintain healthy ends and keep your style fresh.[/vc_column_text]

What’s the difference between balayage and ombre?

[vc_column_text]Balayage involves hand-painting highlights for a natural, sun-kissed look, while ombre transitions from darker roots to lighter ends.[/vc_column_text]

Do you offer consultations for hair colour?

[vc_column_text]Yes! We encourage consultations before any colour service at our hair salon for women to ensure we understand your goals and can recommend the best approach for your hair. Schedule your consultation online today![/vc_column_text]

Can I add a hair spa treatment to my haircut or color service?

[vc_column_text]Absolutely! Our hair spa treatments can be added to any service for extra nourishment and shine.[/vc_column_text]

Are your hair products safe for color-treated hair?

[vc_column_text]Yes, we use high-quality, professional products that are safe and designed to enhance and protect color-treated hair.[/vc_column_text]

How long does a typical appointment take?

[vc_column_text]The duration of your appointment depends on the service you’re receiving. For haircuts, it usually takes around 45 minutes to an hour. Colour treatments or hair spa services may take longer, typically 2-3 hours.[/vc_column_text]

Do I need to book an appointment in advance?

[vc_column_text]While we do accept walk-ins when available, we highly recommend booking your appointment in advance to ensure you secure your preferred time with your stylist.[/vc_column_text]

How soon can I wash my hair after a color treatment?

[vc_column_text]We recommend waiting at least 48 hours before washing your hair after a colour treatment to allow the colour to be fully set. This helps preserve the vibrancy of the colour.[/vc_column_text]

Do you offer hair services for special events?

[vc_column_text]Yes, at our hair salon for women, we offer a variety of styling options for special occasions, including weddings, parties, and formal events. You can book a consultation to discuss your desired style.[/vc_column_text]

Are your services suitable for all hair types?

[vc_column_text]Yes, our stylists are trained to work with all hair types, including straight, wavy, curly, and textured hair. We tailor each service to meet the specific needs of your hair.[/vc_column_text]

At what age can my child get a haircut at your salon?

[vc_column_text]We provide haircuts for children aged 4-12. Our stylists create a comfortable and fun environment for young clients.[/vc_column_text]

How much does a children’s haircut cost?

[vc_column_text]Children’s haircuts start at $22+. You can also add a blow-dry and style for an additional $17+.[/vc_column_text]

What is eyebrow tinting?

[vc_column_text]Eyebrow tinting is a treatment that uses a semi-permanent dye to enhance the colour and shape of your eyebrows, giving them a fuller definition.[/vc_column_text]

How long does eyebrow tinting last?

[vc_column_text]Typically, eyebrow tinting lasts around 3-4 weeks, depending on your skin type and care routine.[/vc_column_text]

How much does eyebrow tinting cost?

[vc_column_text]Eyebrow tinting at our hair salon for women – Groove Unisex Salon in Kharadi, Pune is available for $17, providing a quick and effective way to enhance your brows.[/vc_column_text]
[/vc_column][/vc_row]
